decisions.decision: 027b: Variant A (banner), extended to show both pending-review AND approved-not-filed in one unified banner with two collapsible sections
decisions.rationale: User chose banner over ghost rows; wants pending-from-ops visible too

decisions.decision: 027c: 10-col to 5-col table with urgency left-border accents, progress bars, relative dates, last payment, fully-paid hidden by default
decisions.rationale: Design spike addressing 10 identified gaps in current table

next_action: Open http://localhost:8000/.planning/spikes/027c-collectibles-table-redesign/spike.html to verify the table redesign. Record verdict, then /gsd:spike --wrap-up to package findings before planning implementation.
